hooks.command: $data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.env' -or $f -match 'fly\.toml') { [PSCustomObject]@{hookSpecificOutput=[PSCustomObject]@{hookEventName='PreToolUse';permissionDecision='deny';permissionDecisionReason='Edit .env and fly.toml files manually - Claude must not touch secrets.'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress }; exit 0
$json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -match '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$') { & pnpm exec biome check --write $f 2>$null }; exit 0

$data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $data.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -notmatch '\.(ts|tsx)$') { exit 0 }; if ($f -match 'apps.backend') { $pkg = '@amana/backend' } elseif ($f -match 'apps.principal') { $pkg = '@amana/principal' } elseif ($f -match 'apps.agent') { $pkg = '@amana/agent' } elseif ($f -match 'packages.api-client') { $pkg = '@amana/api-client' } elseif ($f -match 'packages.types') { $pkg = '@amana/types' } elseif ($f -match 'packages.ui') { $pkg = '@amana/ui' } elseif ($f -match 'packages.validation') { $pkg = '@amana/validation' } else { exit 0 }; $out = cmd /c ('pnpm --filter ' + $pkg + ' typecheck 2>&1'); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output $out; exit 2 }; exit 0
